title: tephrosia pallens
intro: Tephrosia pallens, also known as the White Horsefly, is a flowering plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Tephrosia pallens include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its use as a natural remedy for snake bites. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and ointments, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
